case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS AMERICAN MORTGAGE GROUP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,730.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN MORTGAGE GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
